message.content:
### 1. RENDERING CHECK  
- ✅ Renders correctly: No white/blank screen, broken layout, error overlay, or console errors.  


### 2. UI ELEMENTS  
- Bottom sheet with drag handle (top center, horizontal line).  
- Title: *"NOW PLAYING"* (small text) + *"Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation"* (large text) + *"Episode 1"* (small text).  
- Segmented control: *"Subtitled (Sub)"* (inactive) + *"Dubbed (Dub)"* (active, green background).  
- Provider section header: *"PROVIDER"* (label) + *"4 available"* (count).  
- Provider rows (4 total):  
  1. **BEEP**: Green background, ★ star badge, blue square badge, *"Soft sub · CC"* description, green checkmark (selected).  
  2. **Koto**: ★ star badge, *"Hard sub"* description.  
  3. **Neko**: Blue square badge, *"Soft sub · CC"* description.  
  4. **GG**: No badges, *"GG"* description.  
- Fallback notice: *"Fallback is ON — If your selected provider fails, the app will try the next one automatically."* (bottom).  


### 3. DESIGN MATCH  
- ✅ Dark premium theme: Black background, charcoal cards, emerald-green accent (checkmark, active tab).  
- ✅ Mobile-first portrait layout: Bottom sheet fits screen, elements aligned vertically.  
- ✅ Th3-Anime replica: Bottom sheet with Sub/Dub control + provider list + green checkmark.  
- ✅ DUB tab is **clearly active**: Green background, white text (vs. Sub’s dark background, gray text).  


### 4. VISUAL ISSUES  
- ✅ No layout bugs, overlapping elements, or missing provider rows.  
- ✅ Color mismatches: None (emerald-green accent consistent, DUB tab highlighted correctly).  
- ✅ Spacing: Elements are evenly spaced, no overcrowding.  
- ✅ DUB tab distinction: Clearly active (green background) vs. Sub (dark background).
